summary: Frontend-only testing for mobile responsiveness across ALL pages (390x844 viewport). All 10 test requirements PASSED. Pages tested: Homepage, PackagesPage, CalculatorPage, OnderhoudPage, BlogPage, WhyWebsitePage, OverMijPage, DienstenPage, /about redirect, and dark mode toggle.
passed_tests: 1. PASS: Homepage (/) mobile - Nav height 56px (h-14), full-width CTA buttons, readable hero text, compact layout
2. PASS: PackagesPage (/pakketten) mobile - Compact hero, Rebranding Pakket €349 visible, nav height 57px
3. PASS: CalculatorPage (/calculator) mobile - Compact header pt-20, package selection cards visible (Basis €500, Pro €900)
4. PASS: OnderhoudPage (/onderhoud) mobile - Compact hero, full-width CTA button (358px), features visible (Hosting, Beveiliging, Backups, Bug Fixes)
5. PASS: BlogPage (/blog) mobile - Compact nav h-14, readable article content, smaller hero text
6. PASS: WhyWebsitePage (/waarom-website) mobile - Hero text readable, stats visible (95%, 24/7, €500)
7. PASS: OverMijPage (/over-mij) mobile - 2x2 values grid (Persoonlijk, Resultaatgericht, Betrouwbaar, Snel), stacked timeline cards (Achtergrond, Passie, Yrvante)
8. PASS: DienstenPage (/diensten) mobile - Compact hero, service cards readable (Webdesign €500, Onderhoud & Hosting)
9. PASS: /about redirect - Navigating to /about correctly redirects to /over-mij
10. PASS: Dark mode on mobile - Toggle via hamburger menu works, white text (rgb(255,255,255)) on dark background
critical_code_review_comments: All pages use h-14 (56px) nav height on mobile - consistent across all pages
Hero sections use pt-20 on mobile for compact layout
Content padding uses px-4 on mobile for proper spacing
CTA buttons are full-width on mobile (358px on 390px viewport)
Dark mode toggle accessible via hamburger menu on mobile
OverMijPage 2x2 grid uses grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 for mobile-first design
/about redirect implemented correctly with React Router Navigate component
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19: Mobile responsiveness testing complete for all pages at 390x844 viewport. Key findings: (1) All navbars use h-14 (56-57px) on mobile. (2) All hero sections use pt-20 for compact layout. (3) CTA buttons are full-width (358px) on mobile. (4) Dark mode toggle is in hamburger menu on mobile - click hamburger first, then sun/moon icon. (5) /about redirects to /over-mij. (6) OverMijPage has 2x2 values grid and stacked timeline cards on mobile. All pages render correctly with readable text and proper spacing.
